metadata.description: Navigate to Interstellar (2014) on IMDb, click Rate, select 9 stars, and submit — verifying the UpdateTitleRating mutation fires with rating=9.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On IMDb, open the title page for 'Interstellar' (2014) and give it a rating of 9 out of 10 stars using the Rate button. You will need to be signed in.
